title: Bed Bug Treatment in Astoria, Queens | $1,200 – $3,500
metaDescription: Professional bed bug treatment in Astoria, Queens. Effective heat and chemical treatments for apartments and homes. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Bed bugs are a growing concern in Astoria's diverse mix of pre-war walk-ups, modern high-rises, and classic garden apartments. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services throughout Astoria, from the waterfront near Astoria Park to the bustling commercial corridors along Steinway Street and Ditmars Boulevard. Our certified technicians use proven heat treatment and eco-friendly chemical solutions to eliminate bed bug infestations quickly and effectively.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Astoria residents and property managers for years, understanding the unique challenges of bed bug control in Queens' dense residential neighborhoods. We offer transparent pricing, same-day emergency service, and a 90-day warranty on all bed bug treatments, ensuring your home stays pest-free.
localContext: Astoria's blend of historic brownstones, multi-family buildings near the Broadway elevated train, and newer construction along the waterfront each present unique bed bug challenges. Our technicians are experienced with all building types in the neighborhood, from the Greek-American community homes near 30th Avenue to the family apartments surrounding PS 122 and the Kaufman Astoria Studios area.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Astoria?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Astoria typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method. Studio and one-bedroom apartments generally cost $1,200–$1,800, while larger multi-bedroom units or severe infestations may reach $3,500. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Astoria homes?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications. Heat treatment raises the temperature in affected rooms to 120–135°F, killing bed bugs at all life stages in a single session. Chemical treatments use EPA-approved products applied to cracks, baseboards, and furniture, often requiring follow-up visits. Many Astoria clients prefer heat treatment for its speed and effectiveness in apartment buildings.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in an Astoria apartment?
faqs.answer: Heat treatment typically takes 6–8 hours for a standard Astoria apartment, with results in one day. Chemical treatments require 2–3 hours per visit, with follow-up appointments scheduled 10–14 days apart. Most infestations are fully resolved within 2–4 weeks. We work around your schedule and can coordinate with landlords and property managers throughout the process.

faqs.question: Do you service all areas of Astoria for bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide bed bug treatment throughout all of Astoria, including Old Astoria, Ditmars, Astoria Heights, and the Hallets Point waterfront area. We service residential buildings, apartments, co-ops, and single-family homes near all major corridors including 30th Avenue, Broadway, Steinway Street, and Astoria Boulevard. Same-day emergency service is available for urgent infestations.
